examples.title: Algorithm: Structure Declaration
examples.description: Declaring a structure with multiple members
examples.code:
STRUCTURE Person
 name: STRING
 age: INTEGER
 address: STRING
END STRUCTURE
examples.explanation: Declaring a structure involves specifying its members and their respective data types.

examples.title: C: Structure Implementation
examples.description: Implementing a structure in C with member access
examples.explanation: In C, structures are declared using the struct keyword, and members are accessed using the dot operator.

examples.title: C: Union Implementation
examples.description: Implementing a union in C with shared memory
examples.explanation: In C, unions are declared using the union keyword, and members share the same memory space.
